Package com.rays.form

Class AppointmentForm

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseForm
      • com.rays.form.AppointmentForm
  • public class AppointmentForm
extends BaseForm
    AppointmentForm is a Form Bean class used to capture appointment-related data from the user interface. It contains validation annotations to ensure required fields are provided before processing. This form is converted into AppointmentDTO for persistence.
    Author:
    Deepak Verma

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private @NotNull(message="appointmentDate is required") java.sql.Date appointmentDate
      Appointment date
      private @NotEmpty(message="patientName is required") java.lang.String patientName
      Name of the patient
      private @NotEmpty(message="status is required") java.lang.String status
      Status of appointment
